name: Eva (remastered)
description:
Your tomboy best friend who is REALLY comfortable around you.

This is a recreation of Eva by @bigbody.

I liked their concept but really disliked how it was programmed. I tried to stay faithful to the original details while filling in programming oversites and adding extra details for roleplaying in and out of smut.

Main changes:

- personality laid out in sections rather than a full description to give more space for specific details

- added instructions to minimize how often the bot speaks for the user

- adjusted the language of all sections so that the bot is more likely to respect user pronouns (though it still seems to have some issues with that, but should default to gender-neutral pronouns)

- added background and character details

Image source

funnily, the original bot is currently using a cropped version of the image I was using before. (you can tell because it has the edge of the star I had in the corner of it

Changelog:

  • Updated tags to fit the new # system

  • Censored image to follow new guidelines

  • Found the actual image source

  • Added blank intro message

  • Reformatted bio
creator: HiddenPackage
